description: Ceremonial void caller who turns resonant heavy weapons into steady battlefield authority.

presentation.headline: Heavy abyss caller who turns every takedown into a deeper battlefield resonance.
presentation.fantasy_hook: A broad ceremonial mantle, resonant war horn, crown-like horns, and floating abyss shards create a commanding silhouette.
presentation.identity_summary: The Abyss Herald combines heavy portal artillery with ritual and infernal relics. Each takedown deepens the resonance, briefly increasing damage and armor.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant damage and armor, stacking up to three times while the herald's abyssal call continues.
tradeoffs: Needs takedowns to build full resonance
